MIGUEL BARQUERA OF THE KONG LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF RYAN YEE IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 9, 2011 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEPARTMENT 301 NO LATER THAN JUNE 6, 2011.
